title: Tsutomu Nihei's Tower Dungeon Manga Promoted in Video With Animated Clips
content: On Tuesday, the official YouTube channel for Kodansha 's Monthly Shonen Sirius magazine started streaming a promotional video to commemorate the release of Tsutomu Nihei 's sixth Tower Dungeon manga volume.
author: ANN

title: Love Live! Hasu no Sora Jōgakuin School Idol Club Film's Trailer Previews Music
content: A "music trailer" for the Love Live! Hasu no Sora Jogakuin School Idol Club Bloom Garden Party 3D anime film debuted on Tuesday. The trailer introduces the insert song "Hana Sakeba Yume Kakeru" (When the Flowers Bloom, Dreams Take Off").
author: ANN

title: My Dear Detective's Natsumi Ito Launches New Manga Series
content: Natsumi Ito announced on X (formerly Twitter) on Friday a new manga series Bungō no Oyatsu (Snacks of Literary Giants) that will launch on Futabasha's Web Action platform on May 29. The series follows rookie editor Tsubame's attempts to bribe sweet-toothed author Uguisudani with treats to submit work by the deadline.
author: ANN

title: Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to Novels Gets Manga Adaptation
content: Yomiya Ririura launched a manga adaptation of Kaori Mado's Kimi to Hanabi to Yakusoku to (You, Fireworks, and the Promise or Kimi-Hana for short) light novel on Shogakukan's Sunday Webry on Thursday.Image via Yomiya Ririura's X/Twitter© Yomiya Ririura, Kaori Mado, Akamoku, ShogakukanThe coming-of-age romance is set…
author: ANN

title: Isaku Natsume's Candy Color Paradox Manga Ends
content: ©Isaku Natsume, Shinshokan, Viz MediaThe May issue of Shinshokan's Chéri+ magazine published the final chapter of Isaku Natsume's Candy Color Paradox (Ameiro Paradox) manga on Monday.Viz Media's boys love manga imprint SuBLime is releasing the manga in English, and it describes the first volume:Satoshi Onoe takes…
author: ANN

title: BookWalker Global Service Launches New Global English Platform With LCP DRM System Following Delay
content: Kadokawa's BookWalker Global store announced on Monday that it has launched its new rebuilt website, apps, and reader, after a delay from February. The launch includes the previously announced new Lightweight Content Protection (LCP) DRM system, which allows users to access purchases through LCP-compatible reading…
author: ANN

title: Yūgo Kobayashi's New Manga Delayed to Summer, Aoashi Brotherfoot Spinoff to Resume on April 6
content: This year's 18th issue of Shogakukan's Big Comic Spirits magazine announced on Monday that Yūgo Kobayashi's planned new manga will launch this summer. In addition, Aoashi Brotherfoot, the spinoff to Kobayashi's Aoashi manga, will resume in the magazine's 19th issue on April 6.
author: ANN

title: Hajime no Ippo Manga Takes Break Due to Creator's Hospitalization
content: Image via Amazon Japan© George Morikawa, KodanshaGeorge Morikawa announced on X/Twitter that his Hajime no Ippo boxing manga will remain on break as he was hospitalized on Monday and is focusing on recovery. He expects to be back in about a month.
author: ANN

title: 'Go for It, Nakamura!' TV Anime Gets Same-Day English Dub
content: Image courtesy of Crunchyroll©Nakamura-kun!! Animation ProjectCrunchyroll announced on Monday that it will stream a same-day English dub for the television anime adaptation of Syundei's Go for It, Nakamura! (Ganbare!
author: ANN

title: Dark Horse Licenses Suicide Island, Babanba Banban Vampire, Asobi Asobase, Forget-Me-Not Manga
